records.ety: [F. mandrin, prob. through (assumed) LL. mamphurinum, fr. L. mamphur a bow drill.]

defs: A bar of metal inserted in the work to shape it, or to hold it, as in a lathe, during the process of manufacture; an arbor.
The live spindle of a turning lathe; the revolving arbor of a circular saw. It is usually driven by a pulley.
